title: First birding festival to offer unique experience
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The first and...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The first and much-anticipated Bitou Birding Festival gets into full flight today, with unique birding experiences for all.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The first and much-anticipated Bitou Birding Festival gets into full flight today, with unique birding experiences for all."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Bitou has become a sanctuary for birding enthusiasts as a result of the area's rich birdlife, and the festival, which starts on Friday 27 September and ends on 6 October, will be celebrating exactly that."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Various birding role-players in Bitou will be hosting the festival, to showcase the rich diversity of birdlife across many varied habitats in the area including Plettenberg Bay, Wittedrift, Keurboomsstrand and Nature's Valley.","html":"Various birding role-players in Bitou will be hosting the festival, to showcase the rich diversity of birdlife across many varied habitats in the area including Plettenberg Bay, Wittedrift, Keurboomsstrand and Nature's Valley."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Engage with experts"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is also set to include many highlights including allowing festinos to engage with experts through a variety of talks on birding-related topics.","html":"It is also set to include many highlights including allowing festinos to engage with experts through a variety of talks on birding-related topics."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Festivalgoers will also be able to take a self-drive birding route that will take them through various diverse birding habitats.","html":"Festivalgoers will also be able to take a self-drive birding route that will take them through various diverse birding habitats."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Other highlights include various expert-guided bird walks, birding activities like netting, ringing and recording with Dr Mark Brown, as well as a birding canoe adventure along the Bitou River.","html":"Other highlights include various expert-guided bird walks, birding activities like netting, ringing and recording with Dr Mark Brown, as well as a birding canoe adventure along the Bitou River."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Open-sea excursions"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For the more adventurous there will also be open-sea excursions to learn more about pelagic birds.","html":"For the more adventurous there will also be open-sea excursions to learn more about pelagic birds."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Over the years many studies have been done around the benefits of birding on physical and mental health, and therefore the festival organisers also plan on offering birding-centred wellness activities - blending morning yoga and meditation with birdwatching.","html":"Over the years many studies have been done around the benefits of birding on physical and mental health, and therefore the festival organisers also plan on offering birding-centred wellness activities - blending morning yoga and meditation with birdwatching."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Raptor display"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Another highlight of the programme is a bird-inspired art and photography exhibition as well as photo competitions, lucky draws and social media contests.","html":"Another highlight of the programme is a bird-inspired art and photography exhibition as well as photo competitions, lucky draws and social media contests."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Finally, there will also be a tour with a raptor display, a talk at the local raptor rescue and rehabilitation centre, and a fundraising dinner.","html":"Finally, there will also be a tour with a raptor display, a talk at the local raptor rescue and rehabilitation centre, and a fundraising dinner."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Festivalgoers would be able to experience wetlands, rivers, estuaries, fynbos habitats, Afromontane forest biomes, urban areas and grasslands, and coastal areas and pelagic zones.","html":"Festivalgoers would be able to experience wetlands, rivers, estuaries, fynbos habitats, Afromontane forest biomes, urban areas and grasslands, and coastal areas and pelagic zones."},{"type":"list","items":["For more information and bookings, visit www.bitou.birdingfestival.co.za"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: First birding festival to offer unique experience
